metadata.title: Tight 2v1 Hold on A Site with Clean Crossfire Setup in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how positioning and calm aim hold off two enemies on A site. A great example of teamwork and focus in a clutch moment.
Got a favorite spot to play defense? Let me know!

Drop your best clutch clips in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #clutch
metadata.cta: Drop your best clutch clips in the comments!
